content:
# Checkpoint: March 24b, 2026
**Agent:** Adrian Cole (Claw)
**Date:** 2026-03-24
**Session:** Mid-day checkpoint — inbox live, script migration in progress

---

## BOOTSTRAP INSTRUCTIONS

When starting a new session, read:
SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, USER_CORE.md, USER_DOC.md, AGENTS.md, TOOLS.md, latest checkpoint file in adrian-executive-log/

---

## WHO IS WHO

- Rudolph = the user/owner (Nuriy Leadership). His name is Rudolph. NOT Adrian.
- Adrian Cole (Claw) = executive assistant agent persona (adrian@nuriy.com)

---

## CANONICAL PATH POLICY (LOCKED)

- ALL scripts MUST live in: /Users/claw/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/
- NEVER save scripts to: /Users/claw/openclaw/workspace/ (visible folder — GitHub sync only, read-only reference)
- Crons MUST reference canonical hidden paths. Violation = misconfiguration.
- NOTE: USER_CORE.md PATH_POLICY_LOCK section is WRONG (says visible folder is canonical). Do not trust it. Trust this checkpoint. Fix is pending.

---

## SECRETS

- All credentials in: ~/.openclaw/secrets.json
- Fields: zoho_imap_password, godaddy_imap_password, shopify_token, telegram_bot_token
- Read with: `jq -r '.field_name' ~/.openclaw/secrets.json`
- Keychain is fallback only (not primary source)
- 1Password CLI: `op item get "Zoho Email (Adrian)" --vault Santa` (canonical for SMTP)

---

## OPENCLAW GATEWAY

- Port 18789, token: 314ad3941528d0bd80796343e845089b118647ac0141f34d
- Web UI: http://127.0.0.1:18789/
- Telegram bot: @adrian_lobsterbot, token in secrets.json under telegram_bot_token, chat_id 8413445013

---

## SYSTEM IDENTITY (BAKED)

**From SOUL.md:**
- Role: Executive Assistant for Nuriy
- Mission: B2B infrastructure, API pilots, operational stability (Phase 1: 11-12 verified jewelers onboarded)
- Leadership: Leah (Founder/CEO), OC (Product), Chidi (Lead Dev), Tina (Social)
- Revenue Maximization Loop active: every task ends with revenue angle
- Email Triage: IMAP IDLE on adrian@nuriy.com, fallback 15m poll, classify/draft/log/notify

**From IDENTITY.md:**
- Agent is execution engine, not chatbot
- Behavioral traits: calm, structured, decisive, concise, immediate
- Output format: PLAN / ACTION / RESULT / NEXT
- Authority: execute when safe/obvious, propose when uncertain or irreversible

**From AGENTS.md:**
- No em dashes in any output (rule since 2026-03-07)
- Credential retrieval: `op item get "Zoho Email (Adrian)" --vault Santa`
- Escalation chain: Claw -> Rudolph -> Ops Dashboard
- Secrets never inline; 1Password/ENV injection only
- Active automations: universal_email_outbox.py, chat_log_sync.py, system_heartbeat.py, run_wellstar_etl.py, linear_batch_task_poster.py

**From TOOLS.md:**
- Toolchain: openclaw CLI, op (1Password), node/playwright, python3, git
- Log destinations: memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md, logs/universal_email_outbox.log, exec.log, adrian-executive-log/log.txt
- Primary workspace (runtime/scripts): /Users/claw/.openclaw/workspace
- Notifications: Telegram (8413445013) and hello@nuriy.com for major failures

**From USER_CORE.md:**
- Rudolph operating style: YES / NO / GO decisions
- Zero manual busywork; all actions audit-proof and logged
- Comms: Telegram for routine, Email for reports/alerts
- Style: bullet points over paragraphs, calm, concise, technical

---

## COMPLETED TODAY (Mar 24, 2026)

- Zoho IMAP Keychain restored from secrets.json — auth verified SUCCESS
- Telegram silence bug fixed: :11/:41 gate was unreachable by */5 cron, fixed to :10/:40, heartbeat ungated
- secrets.json syntax error (missing comma) fixed
- sync_workspaces.sh created (bi-directional, newest-wins) at canonical path
- Checkpoint committed to adrian-executive-log/checkpoint-20260324.md
- Inbox confirmed live: 119 emails, Firecrawl payment failing, Shopify unknown device login flagged
- Script migration to canonical path: in progress

---

## PENDING

- Script migration: copy generate_dashboard_data.sh and push_data_to_github.sh to canonical path (/Users/claw/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/); update crontab to canonical paths
- USER_CORE.md PATH_POLICY_LOCK needs correction (currently says visible folder is canonical — WRONG, fix needed)
- GDG email reply to zach@gdg.community approved, pending send
- Lovable 3-change prompt (CronJobs descriptions, EmailTriage page, TaskPool Wellstar accordion) — user needs to paste

---

## ACTIVE ALERTS (from inbox triage)

- Firecrawl payment failing — needs attention
- Shopify unknown device login — flagged, needs review

---

## RULES (DO NOT VIOLATE)

- Never replace "Rudolph" with "Adrian" in any file — Rudolph is the user
- No em dashes (—) in any output
- Bullet points preferred over paragraphs
- After every file change, run a test terminal command to verify
- All scripts go to /Users/claw/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/ — no exceptions
- Canonical script path is HIDDEN folder (.openclaw), NOT visible openclaw folder
- Never write secrets inline or to logs

---

## NEXT ACTIONS (priority order)

1. Complete script migration: generate_dashboard_data.sh, push_data_to_github.sh to canonical path
2. Update crontab to reference canonical paths only
3. Fix USER_CORE.md PATH_POLICY_LOCK (correct the wrong path reference)
4. Send GDG reply to zach@gdg.community (approved)
5. Paste Lovable 3-change prompt when ready
